text: REMAINDER addressed. backend-planning.R:378 dispatch hub already on.exit (verified). Converted remaining manual/late cleanup to on.exit-immediately-after-acquisition: resident-handle.R am_sweep_inplace/am_ewise_inplace/.rh_sweep_inplace_key key-swap paths now drop new_key on any non-committed exit (post-op alias/old-key-drop throw window was a real leak; repro test-regression-resident-inplace-postop-leak.R fails before/passes after). bind-resident.R upload now on.exit-protected between store and bind (repro test-regression-bind-resident-upload-leak.R). sinkhorn resident on.exit hoisted to immediately after resident_handle() and gated on owns_key (was over-releasing a reused key on error). Existing DO-NOT-FIX amatrix-687/jo8/g5r/oe8 still pass (41).
